note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiff.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

superior_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

district_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

location_town.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

undefined.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

undefined_2.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

printed_name.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

undefined_3.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

attorney_for.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

bar_no_if_applicable.guidance: An attorney's Maine bar registration number.

address_1.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

address_3.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.
